TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kersti Kaljulaid ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 12, Kersti Kaljulaid, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1969) mrhuw Estonia ta' misuw hya' ga Kersti Kaljulaid, aring ryax tay 10 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Her presidential term ended on 11 October 2021.
S.PHON: kers~…ēti kaljulai* rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, kers~…ēti kaljulai*, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw es~…ētonia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a kers~…ēti kaljulai*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ńßer pres~…ēi*ential term en*e* on ** o ¶~ ®toő≤er ****.
S.FORM: Kersti Kaljulaid ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 12, Kersti Kaljulaid, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1969) mrhuw Estonia ta' misuw hya' ga Kersti Kaljulaid, aring ryax tay 10 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Her presidential term ended on 11 October 2021.
S.PHON: kers~…ēti kaljulai* rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, kers~…ēti kaljulai*, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw es~…ētonia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a kers~…ēti kaljulai*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ńßer pres~…ēi*ential term en*e* on ** o ¶~ ®toő≤er ****.
